physiotherapist.name: Dr. Aryan Sharma
physiotherapist.tagline: Helping You Move Better, Live Stronger
physiotherapist.about: Dedicated and compassionate Physiotherapist with a focus on holistic patient recovery. With a Bachelor of Physiotherapy and experience treating over 200 patients in Ahmedabad, I specialize in personalized treatment plans that combine modern therapy techniques with empathetic care.

services.title: Orthopedic Physiotherapy
services.description: Comprehensive treatment for bone, joint, ligament, tendon, and muscle disorders to restore full mobility.

services.title: Sports Injury Rehab
services.description: Advanced rehabilitation protocols for athletes to ensure safe and quick return to peak performance.

services.title: Post Surgery Rehabilitation
services.description: Guided recovery programs following orthopedic surgeries to regain strength and flexibility.

services.title: Back & Neck Therapy
services.description: Specialized manual therapy and posture correction for chronic spinal alignment issues.

services.title: Joint Mobility Therapy
services.description: Manual mobilization techniques aimed at improving range of motion and reducing stiffness.

services.title: Exercise Therapy
services.description: Tailored exercise regimes focused on core stability, muscle strengthening, and endurance.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Mehta
testimonials.text: Dr. Aryan's treatment for my sports injury was excellent. I was back on the field sooner than expected. Highly professional!

testimonials.name: Sita Patel
testimonials.text: The post-surgery rehab I received was life-changing. The personalized care and attention to detail are what set this clinic apart.

testimonials.name: Amit Shah
testimonials.text: Highly recommended for chronic back pain. The posture correction tips were very helpful and the exercises are easy to follow.

whyChooseMe.title: Personalized Treatment
whyChooseMe.description: Every patient receives a unique care plan tailored specifically to their condition and goals.

whyChooseMe.title: Modern Techniques
whyChooseMe.description: We utilize the latest evidence-based physiotherapy methods and equipment for faster recovery.

whyChooseMe.title: Goal-Oriented
whyChooseMe.description: Our focus is not just on reducing pain, but on returning you to your peak physical performance.
